title: reel:get-scene-timeline args
description: Read one scene's editable timeline in a compact form: shots, dialogue lines, QTE cues, audio clips, text overlays (花字) and markers — each with its id and timing (ms). Call this BEFORE any reel:update-shot / reel:edit-* tool so you know the real ids and current times. Read-only; the workbench need not be open.

scenarioId.description: Optional target scenario id. Defaults to the active scenario.

sceneId.description: Scene (node) id to read. Use reel:get-scenario to discover scene ids.
